name: BB:UBA : URL Category Filter
notes:
This building block is used to provide the log source types available to the Risky URL Filter Category rules. 
Note: Just adding a log source to building block does not mean the source will be able to pull the category. Some other updates maybe required.
bb_references: BB:UBA : URL Category Filter on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Blue Coat SG Appliance, Cisco IronPort, McAfee Web Gateway, Check Point, Palo Alto PA Series, Forcepoint V Series, Fortinet FortiGate Security Gateway
when the event matches Web Category (custom) is not N/A
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : URL Category Filter on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Blue Coat SG Appliance, Cisco IronPort, McAfee Web Gateway, Check Point, Palo Alto PA Series, Forcepoint V Series, Fortinet FortiGate Security Gateway
AND when the event matches Web Category (custom) is not N/A
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
